prompt: Review: Hero has top pair and villain has an underpair. Who wins?
why_v1: Top pair still beats an underpair here before kicker detail matters.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Hero still wins with the stronger pair.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The ace on the board still pairs hero's hand, while pocket sevens still sit below that pair, so the stronger made hand remains ahead.
